opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These blisters on my elbows are itching so intensely I feel like tearing my skin off, and I haven't slept a wink. I'm scared it's scabies and I'll give it to my housemates.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The itch is unbearable and I need to know if it's contagious.

symptom_narrative.character: tiny grouped itchy blisters, intense burning itch
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: scratched some areas raw, no fever, no rash in the mouth

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: shares a house; no housemates itching

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to know if he must isolate from housemates

objective_data_offered.value: small grouped blistery bumps on both elbows and buttocks, several scratched raw with tiny crusts; symmetric on both sides; no lines between the fingers that I can see
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view; cannot confirm burrows or perform dermoscopy/microscopy remotely
